name: Chilled Puree of Beet & Watermelon
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a stock pot over low heat.
2. Add the onions and cook slowly, stirring occasionally, for about 7 minutes.
3. Add the beets and continue to cook slowly, covered, until most of their water has been released and they have fallen apart, about 35 minutes. Stir often to prevent sticking.
4. Add the chicken stock and salt, cover, and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
6. When the soup is finished cooking, strain it through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl and discard solids.
7. Transfer the beets to a blender or food processor and add the watermelon. Puree until very smooth.
8. Return the puree to the pot and stir in the reserved liquid.
9. Chill the soup well, about 4 hours before serving.
